/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libtask_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so -o libtask_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/task_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/task_msgs/msg/medicine_data__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/task_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/task_msgs/msg/cabinet_order__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/task_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/task_msgs/msg/task__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/task_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/task_msgs/msg/cabinet_running__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/task_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/task_msgs/msg/cabinet_state__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/task_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/task_msgs/msg/car_state__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/task_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/task_msgs/msg/task_state__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/ubuntu/newros_ws/build/task_msgs:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: libtask_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib
